_comment: Copy this file to secrets.json and fill in real values. secrets.json is read by check_replies.py for IMAP and is NEVER printed or committed. Do not paste credentials into chat.
_imap_notes: Gmail: enable 2FA, then create an App Password at https://myaccount.google.com/apppasswords (regular password will NOT work).
iCloud: host imap.mail.me.com, create an app-specific password.
Use the inbox that receives your Craigslist reply emails.
